description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script installing openssh-client, starting ssh-agent, adding $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, and disabling strict host key checking. Define three stages: build_client, build_server, and push_to_s3, and set variables for Mattermost paths and version. In the build_client stage add a build_desktop_app job using the electronuserland/builder:wine-mono image, caching node_modules, producing a $MM_DESKTOP_DIR/release artifact, and executing: apt-get update; apt-get install -y icnsutils graphicsmagick; git clone https://github.com/mattermost/desktop.git; bin/rebrand-desktop-app; cd $MM_DESKTOP_DIR; yarn; CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run build; CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run package:all; run only on the master branch. Also in build_client add a build_webapp job with the kkarczmarczyk/node-yarn image, caching node_modules, artifact $MM_WEBAPP_DIR, running: git clone --branch v${MM_VERSION} https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost-webapp.git; bin/rebrand-webapp; cd $MM_WEBAPP_DIR; make clean; make build > /dev/null 2>&1; only on master. In the build_server stage add a build_server job using golang:1.9, depending on build_webapp, artifact mattermost, running: echo $MM_ARCHIVE_FILE; wget https://releases.mattermost.com/$MM_VERSION/mattermost-team-$MM_VERSION-linux-amd64.tar.gz; tar -xzvf mattermost-team-$MM_VERSION-linux-amd64.tar.gz; MM_SERVER_DIR=mattermost bin/rebrand-server; cp -R $MM_WEBAPP_DIR/dist/** mattermost/client; cp -R mattermost-email-templates/*.html mattermost/templates/; only on master. Finally, in the push_to_s3 stage add a push_to_s3 job with python:latest, depending on build_server, that installs awscli, creates a tar.gz of the mattermost directory named mattermost-${CI_COMMIT_SHA:0:8}.tar.gz, and uploads it to s3://${S3_BUCKET_NAME} using aws s3 cp; it runs only on master.
